title: Binary Search Infinite Loop
description: The function tries to perform binary search but gets stuck in an infinite loop for certain inputs.

title: Factorial Logic Error
description: The function attempts to compute factorial but uses the wrong operation.

title: Two Sum Self Pair Bug
description: The function incorrectly allows using the same element twice when finding a pair.

title: Stack Implementation Bug
description: The function is supposed to return the last inserted element but behaves like a queue.

title: DFS Missing Visit Mark
description: The DFS traversal does not mark nodes before recursion, causing repeated visits.

title: Array Reduce Multiplication Bug
description: The function calculates sum but mistakenly multiplies values.

title: Sorting Numbers Incorrectly
description: Default sorting causes incorrect numeric order.

title: Missing Return Statement
description: The function performs computation but does not return the result.

title: Queue Implementation Bug
description: The function should behave like a queue but removes from wrong end.

title: NaN Comparison Bug
description: The function incorrectly compares NaN using equality.

title: Flatten Array Bug
description: Nested arrays are not flattened correctly.

title: Promise Not Returned
description: The function uses a promise but does not return it.

title: Closure Loop Bug
description: All functions return same value due to incorrect variable scoping.

title: String Reverse Bug
description: Reverse operation is incorrectly chained.

title: Default Parameter Missing
description: Function fails when input is undefined.

title: Reduce Without Initial Value
description: The function crashes on empty arrays due to missing initial value in reduce.

title: Incorrect Even Filter
description: The filter condition uses assignment instead of comparison, causing incorrect results.

title: Object Reference Copy Bug
description: The function returns the same object reference instead of a deep copy.

title: String Length Typo
description: The function tries to access string length but uses incorrect property name.

title: Find First Even Bug
description: The function returns the first odd number instead of the first even number.

title: Incorrect Base Case
description: The recursion lacks proper base case, causing infinite recursion.

title: Array Includes Assignment Bug
description: The function assigns value instead of calling includes method.

title: Async Await Missing
description: The async function does not await the promise, returning unresolved result.

title: Array Index Bug
description: The function returns wrong index from array.

title: Throttle Implementation Bug
description: Throttle function executes too frequently due to missing time check.

title: String Concatenation Bug
description: The function uses subtraction instead of concatenation.

title: Map Logic Error
description: The function doubles numbers instead of squaring them.

title: Empty Array Check Bug
description: The function incorrectly checks if array is empty.

title: Currying Logic Bug
description: The function subtracts values instead of adding them.

title: Deep Nested Flatten Bug
description: The function fails to flatten deeply nested arrays.

title: Closure Loop Trap
description: All functions capture the same variable. Determine the output.

title: Reference Mutation
description: Arrays are passed by reference. Track how mutation affects original.

title: Async Execution Order
description: Understand event loop, promises and timeouts.
code: function solution(){ return "1 4 3 2"; }

title: Recursive Sum
description: Trace recursive calls carefully.
code: function solution(){ function f(n){ if(n===0) return 0; return n+f(n-1);} return f(4);}

title: Type Coercion Trick
description: Understand implicit type conversion in JavaScript.

title: Spread vs Reference
description: Understand shallow copy vs reference behavior.

title: Hoisting Behavior
description: Variable hoisting affects execution order.

title: Nested Closure
description: Track variable scope across nested functions.

title: List Self Reference
description: Appending list to itself creates nested reference.
code: function solution(){ let a=[1,2]; a.push(a); return a.length; }

title: Reduce Accumulator
description: Track how reduce accumulates values.

title: Default Parameter
description: Evaluate behavior when argument is missing.
code: function solution(){ return (function(x=10){return x})(); }

title: Promise Chain
description: Track promise resolution carefully.

title: Sort Behavior
description: Default sort converts numbers to strings.

title: Function Scope
description: Variable shadowing affects output.

title: Map Mutation
description: Map returns new array, original remains unchanged.

title: Set Uniqueness
description: Set removes duplicates.

description: Flat removes one level only.

description: Falsy values in JavaScript.

description: Removes first element of array.

description: Nested reduce execution.

description: Chained string operations.

description: Understand modulo behavior.
